Container.Name: BitBonsai
Container.Overview:
BitBonsai - Automated video encoding and optimization platform.
Supports hardware acceleration: - NVIDIA GPUs (NVENC) - Intel QuickSync (QSV) - AMD GPUs (AMF) - CPU software encoding
Configure GPU passthrough below for hardware acceleration.

Config.Name: Media Library Path
Config.Description: Path to your media library for scanning and encoding

Config.Name: Downloads Path
Config.Description: Path to downloads folder for automatic processing

Config.Name: Transcoding Cache
Config.Description: Temporary transcoding workspace (use cache drive for best performance)

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions (99 = nobody on Unraid)

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions (100 = users on Unraid)

Config.Name: NVIDIA GPU
Config.Description: Enable NVIDIA GPU passthrough for NVENC hardware encoding. Set to 'all' to use all GPUs, or specify GPU UUID (found with: nvidia-smi -L). Leave empty to disable.

Config.Name: Intel QuickSync (QSV)
Config.Description: Enable Intel QuickSync by passing /dev/dri device. Set to '/dev/dri' to enable, leave empty to disable.

Config.Name: AMD GPU (Render)
Config.Description: Enable AMD GPU by passing render device. Set to '/dev/dri/renderD128' to enable, leave empty to disable.

Config.Name: AMD GPU (Card)
Config.Description: AMD GPU card device (usually paired with renderD128). Set to '/dev/dri/card0' to enable, leave empty to disable.

Config.Name: Extra Parameters
Config.Description: Additional Docker parameters. For NVIDIA: '--runtime=nvidia' or '--gpus all'. Leave empty if not using NVIDIA.
